TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Lahekakay_a_panay,_tadapanay,_bangsisay_a_panay, title = Lahekakay_a_panay,_tadapanay,_bangsisay_a_panay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lahekakay_a_panay,_tadapanay,_bangsisay_a_panay} }

S.FORM: lahekakay a panay, tadapanay, bangsisay a panay Bangsisay a panay, i enaray ku nipaluma, matiya i rueru, i ruru pa'urip tu kira bangsisay a panay, tangsa anini masumad tu dengay tu i laku a pasapur, sisa caay kalecad ku cengel, adihayaca tu waytamin A aut tiyice. I matini a mihecaan mabana'tu, tu kapah nu bangsisay a panay, macakat tu ku lipida nu Panay, adihay ku waytaminA, E tiyice atu tanpayce malesingetud tu atu belac, sisa u sakapahay a sapakaen tu adadaay atu hereksa henay a masubu'a sapatata a sapakakilemel tu tiring. Ina bangsisay a panay i kikung, i makapatayay, i lipahakay, i lisin iraaca, mitiya u basisay a panay, u epah, u icep u tapang anu pakaen tu tu'as i PangcaPangcahan. Malecad tu anini ku nipaluma, ira hen ku i enaray a paluma, tangasa i matini caay kasumad ku cidek nu caang nu bangsisay a panay caay katalaw tu cirekay a tu adada nu panay.
S.PHON: ɾaħəkakaj a panaj, taɬ~ɮapanaj, b~b~vaŋsisaj a panaj b~b~vaŋsisaj a panaj, i ənaraj ko~u~u nipaɾo~u~uma, matija i ro~u~uəro~u~u, i ro~u~uro~u~u paʡo~u~urip to~u~u kira b~b~vaŋsisaj a panaj, taŋsa anini maso~u~umaɬ~ɮ to~u~u ɬ~ɮəŋaj to~u~u i ɾako~u~u a pasapo~u~ur, sisa ʦaaj kaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u~u ʦəŋəɾ, aɬ~ɮiħajaʦa to~u~u wajtamin a ao~u~ut tijiʦə. i matini a miħəʦaan mab~b~vanaʡto~u~u, to~u~u kapaħ no~u~u b~b~vaŋsisaj a panaj, maʦakat to~u~u ko~u~u ɾipiɬ~ɮa no~u~u panaj, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u wajtamina, ə tijiʦə ato~u~u tanpajʦə maɾəsiŋəto~u~uɬ~ɮ to~u~u ato~u~u b~b~vəɾaʦ, sisa o~u~u sakapaħaj a sapakaən to~u~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj ato~u~u ħərəksa ħənaj a maso~u~ub~b~vo~u~uʡa sapatata a sapakakiɾəməɾ to~u~u tiriŋ. ina b~b~vaŋsisaj a panaj i kiko~u~uŋ, i makapatajaj, i ɾipaħakaj, i ɾisin iraaʦa, mitija o~u~u b~b~vasisaj a panaj, o~u~u əpaħ, o~u~u iʦəp o~u~u tapaŋ ano~u~u pakaən to~u~u to~u~uʡas i paŋʦapaŋʦaħan. maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u~u anini ko~u~u nipaɾo~u~uma, ira ħən ko~u~u i ənaraj a paɾo~u~uma, taŋasa i matini ʦaaj kaso~u~umaɬ~ɮ ko~u~u ʦiɬ~ɮək no~u~u ʦaaŋ no~u~u b~b~vaŋsisaj a panaj ʦaaj kataɾaw to~u~u ʦirəkaj a to~u~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa no~u~u panaj.
S.FORM: lahekakay a panay, tadapanay, bangsisay a panay Bangsisay a panay, i enaray ku nipaluma, matiya i rueru, i ruru pa'urip tu kira bangsisay a panay, tangsa anini masumad tu dengay tu i laku a pasapur, sisa caay kalecad ku cengel, adihayaca tu waytamin A aut tiyice. I matini a mihecaan mabana'tu, tu kapah nu bangsisay a panay, macakat tu ku lipida nu Panay, adihay ku waytaminA, E tiyice atu tanpayce malesingetud tu atu belac, sisa u sakapahay a sapakaen tu adadaay atu hereksa henay a masubu'a sapatata a sapakakilemel tu tiring. Ina bangsisay a panay i kikung, i makapatayay, i lipahakay, i lisin iraaca, mitiya u basisay a panay, u epah, u icep u tapang anu pakaen tu tu'as i PangcaPangcahan. Malecad tu anini ku nipaluma, ira hen ku i enaray a paluma, tangasa i matini caay kasumad ku cidek nu caang nu bangsisay a panay caay katalaw tu cirekay a tu adada nu panay.
S.PHON: ɾaħəkakaj a panaj, taɬ~ɮapanaj, b~b~vaŋsisaj a panaj b~b~vaŋsisaj a panaj, i ənaraj ko~u~u nipaɾo~u~uma, matija i ro~u~uəro~u~u, i ro~u~uro~u~u paʡo~u~urip to~u~u kira b~b~vaŋsisaj a panaj, taŋsa anini maso~u~umaɬ~ɮ to~u~u ɬ~ɮəŋaj to~u~u i ɾako~u~u a pasapo~u~ur, sisa ʦaaj kaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u~u ʦəŋəɾ, aɬ~ɮiħajaʦa to~u~u wajtamin a ao~u~ut tijiʦə. i matini a miħəʦaan mab~b~vanaʡto~u~u, to~u~u kapaħ no~u~u b~b~vaŋsisaj a panaj, maʦakat to~u~u ko~u~u ɾipiɬ~ɮa no~u~u panaj, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u wajtamina, ə tijiʦə ato~u~u tanpajʦə maɾəsiŋəto~u~uɬ~ɮ to~u~u ato~u~u b~b~vəɾaʦ, sisa o~u~u sakapaħaj a sapakaən to~u~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj ato~u~u ħərəksa ħənaj a maso~u~ub~b~vo~u~uʡa sapatata a sapakakiɾəməɾ to~u~u tiriŋ. ina b~b~vaŋsisaj a panaj i kiko~u~uŋ, i makapatajaj, i ɾipaħakaj, i ɾisin iraaʦa, mitija o~u~u b~b~vasisaj a panaj, o~u~u əpaħ, o~u~u iʦəp o~u~u tapaŋ ano~u~u pakaən to~u~u to~u~uʡas i paŋʦapaŋʦaħan. maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u~u anini ko~u~u nipaɾo~u~uma, ira ħən ko~u~u i ənaraj a paɾo~u~uma, taŋasa i matini ʦaaj kaso~u~umaɬ~ɮ ko~u~u ʦiɬ~ɮək no~u~u ʦaaŋ no~u~u b~b~vaŋsisaj a panaj ʦaaj kataɾaw to~u~u ʦirəkaj a to~u~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa no~u~u panaj.
